title: UK Business Data Survey 2026 user-engagement:  Privacy Notice
body: "The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) will process your personal data when we receive information from organisations or individuals in connection with this user-engagement exercise about the UK Business Data Survey.  The exercise is seeking views from users of the UK Business Data Survey on how it could be developed and improved in future.   This privacy notice explains what we do with your data and how to contact us with any questions.  "
